title: mosla punctulata
intro: Mosla punctulata, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum bitters or chrysanthemum bitters, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Mosla punctulata include relief from headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Mosla punctulata is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
